name: Power Vinyasa (60-min, heated)
description: 60-minute heated power vinyasa. Steady build through Sun A, peak through Sun B with strong standing series, gentle descent, full savasana. Generic power-flow format used at most heated-yoga studios.

music_pedagogy.beat: Beat is clear and consistent so the instructor cues actions and breath on the beat. Two full reps of a movement or breath cycle should land cleanly on bars.
music_pedagogy.voice: Middle of tracks (especially during peak intensity) leaves headroom for the teacher's voice. Avoid dense vocal pile-ups at the top of the arc.
music_pedagogy.count: Tracks have predictable structure supporting an 8-count or 4-count countdown for pose transitions.

phases.name: Opening / Centering
phases.notes: Ambient, no percussion. Students arriving and centering on the mat.

phases.name: Sun A (Rising)
phases.notes: Sun salutation A around minute 5. Steady, rising tempo. Teacher does intention talk during this window.

phases.name: Sun B (Peak)
phases.notes: Sun B sequences, warriors, balances, peak posture. Highest energy of the class.

phases.name: Cool Down (Descent)
phases.notes: Floor work, hip openers, twists, forward folds.

phases.name: Savasana (Closing)
phases.notes: Savasana. No percussion. 5-min meditation buffer if class runs long.

theme_anchor.rationale: Lyrics land after the teacher's 15-min intention talk, during peak energy in the Sun B block.

content_filter: Filter explicit lyrics by default for studio-friendliness. User can opt in to allow.
